maintenanceNote: When releasing app changes, bump APP_VERSION in src/version.ts, APP_VERSION in sw.js and public/sw.js, plus this version value and the root version.json so Settings, service worker caches, and update checks stay in sync.
notes: Added AI Quick Log for pasting JSON meal estimates into Log Food.
Added a Settings prompt and help guide for external AI chatbots.
Kept AI Quick Log local-only with normal review before saving.
